name: Mermaid Pie — Research Funding Distribution
input: Create a pie chart showing research funding distribution: NIH 45%, NSF 20%, Private Foundation 15%, Industry 12%, DoD 5%, Other 3%.
qualityCriteria: No placeholder or lorem ipsum content
napkinBenchmark: Pie chart with labeled slices and percentage values.

data.syntax:
pie title Research Funding Distribution
    "NIH" : 45
    "NSF" : 20
    "Private Foundation" : 15
    "Industry" : 12
    "DoD" : 5
    "Other" : 3
data.caption: Distribution of research funding by source
